creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
If using a jail(thin jail-using 14.2 RELEASE base.txz), deploying FreeBSD 14.2 in the jail will result in the same issue.


-------------------

-------------------------------------

After command run `certctl rehash`, everything is fine.
